data.title: Merge Phase 3 and Phase 4 into single batch-prep phase, renumber all phases
data.description:
Merge Phase 3 (Batch Planning) and Phase 4 (Pre-Batch Checks) into a single phase with steps ordered: (1) pre-flight checks (determines max_agents), (2) claim tasks, (3) sync from main, (4) batch composition using max_agents. Renumber all phases sequentially from Phase 1 with no gaps. Update all cross-references.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Phase 3 and Phase 4 merged into single phase with correct step ordering
- All phases renumbered sequentially (no gaps)
- Orchestration flow diagram updated to reflect new phase numbers
- All internal cross-references (e.g. 'Phase 6 Step 4', 'return to P3') updated
- bash tests/run-all.sh passes with 0 failures

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/skills/sprint/SKILL.md (edit)
